metadata.title: Turning a Tight Angle Into a Clean Double Kill in VALORANT
metadata.description:
Check out how quick reflexes and sharp aim flip this round around. What’s your favorite angle to hold when the pressure’s on? Share your thoughts below.

Got a clutch moment like this? Drop it in the comments!

#shorts #valorant #gaming #fps #valorantclips
